---
title: 'ImaGen: A General Framework for Generating Memory- and Power-Efficient Image
  Processing Accelerators'
author:
- Nisarg Ujjainkar
- Jingwen Leng
- Yuhao Zhu
categories:
- Show All
- Work (Co-)Led by Horizon Lab
topics:
- visual_computing_systems
url_source: https://dl.acm.org/doi/pdf/10.1145/3579371.3589076
code_source: https://github.com/horizon-research/imagen
journ: ISCA
year: 2023
contrib: Work (Co-)Led by Horizon Lab
image: featured.png
pub_number: 72
---
